brief_html: This message will parse data from SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGON (0x53) and will reply with data to send in SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGONPROOF (0x54). You must send BNLS_LOGONCHALLENGE (0x02) before you can send this.
remarks_html: This message will parse data from SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGON (0x53) and will reply with data to send in SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGONPROOF (0x54). You must send BNLS_LOGONCHALLENGE (0x02) before you can send this.
